case_title: SHPOTNIK, VLADIMIR J. VS BSC CULINARY/BOB'S SUPPLY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-28-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BSC CULINARY/BOB'S SUPPLY COMPANY
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2007 - JUDGMENT. F. RAYRAY, CLERK; JPT MARK SCHREIBER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHPOTNIK, VLADIMIR J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BSC CULINARY/BOB'S SUPPLY COMPANY ROSE, PAT JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT FINDS, PLFT DID NOT ESTABLISH DAMAGES ALLEGED TO BE DEFT'S NEGLIGENCE, THAT DEFT AGREED TO DELIVER ALL GOODS ON ONE DATE, OR THAT THE RESTOCKING CHARGE PROVIDED FOR IN THE CONTRACT SHOULD NOT APPLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-28-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROSE, PAT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,180.60 FILED BY SHPOTNIK, VLADIMIR J. AS TO DEFENDANT BSC CULINARY/BOB'S SUPPLY COMPANY ROSE, PAT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2007 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
